metadata.title: Chai Active — Software with life for Jewish communities
metadata.description: We design and build Kehál Platform and other custom digital platforms for Jewish communities, synagogues and businesses. Based in Barcelona.

hero.eyebrow: Kehál Platform — already live at Jabad Barcelona
hero.title: Your community's life, in a single platform
hero.subtitle: Kehál is the community management app already used by Jabad Barcelona to run schedules, events, donations, the mikvah and much more — all in one place, in each community's own language.
hero.imageAlt: Kehál Platform home screen, used today by Jabad Barcelona
hero.trust: Already in real use. No imaginary mockups.

queHacemos.title: We build the technology that sustains your community
queHacemos.intro: At Chai Active we design and build custom digital platforms for Jewish communities, synagogues and businesses. We don't sell generic software: we build with you, starting from how your community actually lives and works.

items.title: Closeness, not a support ticket
items.body: We talk to rabbis, boards and volunteers, not just an IT department. We design for the people who will actually use the platform every day.

items.title: Everything in a language you understand
items.body: Spanish, English, Hebrew and French, with Hebrew laid out natively right-to-left — not a translation bolted on at the last minute.

items.title: A long-term partner
items.body: We stay with you after launch: new features, adjustments and support as your community grows.

items.title: The whole app, or just what you need
items.body: Every Kehál module — mikvah, donations, events, and the rest — also works on its own. Start with what's urgent and grow at your own pace.

confianza.title: Communities and businesses that already trust us

comoLoHacemos.title: A process built for handling sensitive data
comoLoHacemos.intro: We know a community isn't a startup: there's trust built over years, and data that needs to be cared for. That's why we work like this:

steps.title: Discovery with the community
steps.body: We sit down with the rabbi, the board or the management team to understand day-to-day life before writing a single line of code.

steps.title: Custom design
steps.body: We adapt every module — and the community's own identity — to how you already work, not the other way around.

steps.title: Development
steps.body: We build with the same care we'd put into our own community, with joint reviews throughout the process.

steps.title: Launch
steps.body: We support the rollout, train the admin team, and resolve any friction from the first days.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.body: We stay available after launch: maintenance, improvements and new features as the community needs them.

servicios.title: One app at the center, modules all around
servicios.intro: Kehál Platform brings together everything a community needs to manage day to day. And every piece also works on its own.
servicios.standaloneNote: Also available as a standalone module

modules.title: Home / Community dashboard
modules.body: Personalized greeting, civil and Hebrew date side by side, synagogue schedule, and upcoming events with direct sign-up.

modules.title: Hebrew Calendar
modules.body: Halachic times by city — candle lighting, Havdalah —, the weekly parasha, and a combined civil/Hebrew monthly calendar.

modules.title: Events
modules.body: A filterable listing with multiple views, capacity control and direct sign-up for every community activity.

modules.title: Mikvah
modules.body: Slot booking with its own calendar: new booking, my bookings, and full management from your phone.
modules.highlight: A module very few platforms get right

modules.title: Donations
modules.body: A donation portal organized by community area — education, religious life, social welfare — with active-campaign tracking.

modules.title: Jewish life-cycle services
modules.body: Requests for ceremonies and paperwork: Bar/Bat Mitzvah, Brit Milah, weddings and Nachalah registration.

modules.title: Torah and Community
modules.body: Audio and video shiurim, questions to the rabbi, and booking a personal appointment with the Rav.

modules.title: Jconnect — Jewish business & co-work
modules.body: A directory and marketplace for community businesses and professionals: list a business, find collaborators, or reach a trusted service.
modules.highlight: The differentiator no comparable platform offers today

modules.title: Member onboarding
modules.body: A 4-step onboarding flow — account, identity, residence, review — with ID document upload and manual approval by the administration.

galeria.title: This is Kehál today
galeria.intro: No fantasy mockups: these are real screenshots of the platform the Jabad Barcelona community uses every day.

jabad.name: Jabad Barcelona
jabad.challenge: Jabad Barcelona needed to centralize the management of a living community — schedules, events, mikvah, donations and more — without relying on spreadsheets and scattered WhatsApp groups.
jabad.solution: We designed and built Kehál Platform together with HaRav Dovid Libersohn's team, module by module, adapted to how the community already worked.
jabad.result: Kehál is in real use today, with more than 8 active modules: from the Hebrew calendar to the Jconnect business directory.

creativeFavours.name: Creative Favours
creativeFavours.challenge: Creative Favours, a family-run London business with over 10 years in custom Judaica — kippot, benchers, challah covers, wedding and bar/bat mitzvah gifts — needed an online store worthy of its handcrafted product.
creativeFavours.solution: We built a custom website and e-commerce store in Next.js, designed to showcase every piece with the same care put into making it.
creativeFavours.result: A store of their own that reflects over a decade of the family's craft, without depending on generic templates.

perashapp.name: Perashapp
perashapp.challenge: Studying the weekly parasha in depth means following the teacher's audio word by word — something no generic player handles well.
perashapp.solution: We built Perashapp, with audio synchronized word-by-word to the text, and separate panels for teacher and student.
perashapp.result: A study tool already up and running, with perashapp.com as the access point for teachers and students.

seguridad.title: Your community's data, handled with the care it deserves
seguridad.intro: A community isn't a sales CRM: it manages ID documents, family data and sensitive information. That's why security isn't a box we tick at the end — it's part of the design from day one.

items.title: Identity verification
items.body: New member onboarding includes an ID document upload, to make sure whoever joins the community is who they say they are.

items.title: Manual approval
items.body: No sign-up activates itself: the community administration reviews and approves every request, usually within 24-48 hours.

items.title: GDPR compliance
items.body: Personal data processing follows the General Data Protection Regulation, with a clear legal basis for every use of information.

items.title: Document encryption
items.body: Sensitive documents are stored encrypted, not as loose files accessible to anyone with system access.

precios.title: The full platform, or just the module you need today
precios.intro: We don't work with closed, tiered packages. Every community and business starts from a different point, so we offer two paths:

pathApp.title: The full platform
pathApp.body: Every Kehál module integrated into one app, with your community's own identity and Chai Active's support from day one.

pathModulo.title: A specific module
pathModulo.body: Just need to solve the mikvah, or centralize donations? Get that module on its own, with no commitment to the rest.
items: Cost matched to what you actually use
Room to add more modules whenever you need

precios.note: We don't publish fixed rates because every project is different — tell us about yours and we'll tell you what makes sense.

sobreNosotros.title: Chai Active — because "chai" means life
sobreNosotros.body: Chai Active was born in Barcelona, founded by Isaac Ayash Belilty, on a simple idea: technology can also serve Jewish community life, not just business efficiency. "Chai" (חי) means life in Hebrew — and that is, literally, our mission: bringing digital life to communities and businesses that have long sustained themselves with great effort and few tools worthy of them.

contacto.title: Shall we talk about your community?
contacto.intro: Tell us what your community or business needs. No commitment, no technical jargon — just a normal conversation.

form.name: Name
form.message: Tell us how we can help

calendly.body: Pick the time that works best for you, no back-and-forth emails.

footer.tagline: Technology with life, for Jewish communities.

legal.reviewBanner: Working draft. This document must be reviewed by a legal professional and completed with Chai Active's real identification details before going live in production.

paragraphs: In compliance with the information duty set out in article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following details are provided: this website, hereinafter the Website (chaiactive.com), is owned by [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active's legal entity], hereinafter THE OWNER.

sections.heading: Identifying details
paragraphs: Owner: [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active — legal form pending confirmation]
Tax ID: [pending]
Registered address: Barcelona, Spain [full address pending]
Contact email: jactive@gmail.com [pending replacement with contacto@chaiactive.com]
Activity: design and development of software and digital platforms for Jewish communities and organizations

sections.heading: Purpose
paragraphs: The Website's purpose is to present THE OWNER's services, showcase work delivered for Jewish communities and businesses, and enable contact with prospective clients. Access to the Website is free and does not require prior registration, except for features that may require it in the future.

sections.heading: Terms of use
paragraphs: Users agree to make appropriate use of the Website, in accordance with the law, morality, public order and this Legal Notice, refraining from any use that could impede, damage or impair its normal operation.

sections.heading: Intellectual and industrial property
paragraphs: All content on the Website (text, images, design, logos, and screenshots of applications developed by THE OWNER) is owned by THE OWNER or displayed with the express authorization of its respective owners (client communities and businesses), and is protected under intellectual and industrial property law. Reproduction, distribution or public communication without prior authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: THE OWNER is not liable for damages arising from interference, interruptions, technical failures or disconnections in the Website's operation, nor for the content of third-party websites accessible via links from this Website.

sections.heading: Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from access to or use of the Website, the parties submit to the Courts of Barcelona, unless applicable regulations provide otherwise.

In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (GDPR), and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018, of 5 December, on Personal Data Protection and Digital Rights Guarantee (LOPDGDD), the following information is provided:

sections.heading: Data controller
paragraphs: Identity: [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active]
Tax ID: [pending]
Registered address: Barcelona, Spain [pending]
Email: jactive@gmail.com [pending replacement with contacto@chaiactive.com]

sections.heading: What data do we collect?
paragraphs: Through the Website's contact form and/or meeting-booking feature, we collect the data users voluntarily provide: name, email address, phone (optional) and the content of the message or inquiry. No sensitive data or ID documents are collected through this corporate website.

sections.heading: For what purpose do we process your data?
paragraphs: To respond to inquiries received through the contact form, manage meeting/demo bookings, and, if the user expressly consents, send commercial communications related to Chai Active's services.

sections.heading: What is the legal basis for processing?
paragraphs: The data subject's consent, given when filling out and submitting the relevant form (art. 6.1.a GDPR).

sections.heading: How long will we keep your data?
paragraphs: Data will be kept for as long as a commercial or mutual-interest relationship exists, and in any case for the legally established periods to address potential liabilities. If there is no response or continued contact, data will be kept for a maximum of [e.g. 24 months] before deletion.

sections.heading: Who will your data be shared with?
paragraphs: Data will not be shared with third parties, except where legally required. We may rely on technology providers acting as data processors (for example: a hosting/deployment provider [Vercel], an email/form management tool, or a scheduling tool [Calendly]), who will process data only under THE OWNER's instructions and with the guarantees required by the GDPR (including, where applicable, international transfer clauses if the provider is outside the European Economic Area).

sections.heading: What are your rights?
paragraphs: Anyone has the right to obtain confirmation as to whether Chai Active is processing personal data concerning them, and in particular has the right to access their personal data, rectify inaccurate data or request its deletion, as well as to request restriction, objection to, or portability of their data, by writing to jactive@gmail.com [or contacto@chaiactive.com] specifying the right they wish to exercise. They also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if they believe processing does not comply with applicable regulations.

sections.heading: Security measures
paragraphs: THE OWNER adopts the technical and organizational measures necessary to guarantee the security of personal data processed and to prevent its alteration, loss, unauthorized processing or access.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small files installed in the user's browser when visiting a website, which allow, among other things, storing and retrieving information about browsing habits or the user's device.

sections.heading: Cookies used on this Website
paragraphs: Technical (necessary) cookies: essential for the Website to function correctly (for example, remembering the selected language). These do not require consent.

Analytics cookies [pending confirmation of whether Google Analytics or another tool will be used]: allow us to measure visitor numbers and analyze how users use the Website, in order to improve the content offered. These require prior user consent.

Third-party cookies [pending confirmation of embedded tools, e.g. Calendly for booking meetings, or a WhatsApp button]: if the Website includes third-party content, those providers may install their own cookies in accordance with their privacy policies.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
paragraphs: On first accessing the Website, a consent banner will be shown where the user can accept all cookies, reject non-essential ones, or configure their preferences. Users can also delete or block cookies at any time through their browser settings.

sections.heading: More information
paragraphs: For any questions about this Cookie Policy, you can write to us at jactive@gmail.com [or contacto@chaiactive.com].
